name: Ham and Cheese Ball
recipeIngredient: 1 Jar Old English Sharp Cheddar Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften cheese to room temperature.
2. Sprinkle some onion powder over thinly sliced ham and set aside.
3. Mix the cheese with the remainder of onion powder.
4. Chop the ham finely.
5. Place nuts in a blender.
6. Cover the cheese ball with nuts and refrigerate.
